positive: A stylized, high-contrast linework design featuring an astronaut floating amongst abstract nebulae and minimalist geometric constellations. The astronaut's silhouette should be crisp and confident, set against a vibrant, gradient background transitioning from deep indigo to electric teal. Use dotwork, clean vector lines, and stenciled lettering for surrounding elements. Composition must be central, suitable for repeating apparel patterns. Highly detailed, graphic novel aesthetic, ethereal, clean edges, strong contrast, vaporwave futurism, suitable for screen printing.
negative: blur, blurry, noise, grainy, artifact, text, watermark, logo, signature, bad anatomy, extra limbs, messy, smudges, low quality, poor details, cartoon, realistic photo, 3d render
